nodes.name: ChatSimulator.ts
nodes.summary: Supplies a deterministic direct-LLM simulator for evaluation scenarios, supporting Gemini and OpenAI providers, structured SMART-goal parsing, conversation history, and usage capture.

nodes.name: ChatSimulator
nodes.summary: Runs multi-turn, reproducible LLM conversations and reports parsed responses, token usage, completion state, and evaluation errors.

nodes.name: prompt.config.ts
nodes.summary: Defines the structured SMART-goal response contract, strict provider-neutral JSON schema, and safety-focused system prompt for the Camay rehabilitation assistant.
nodes.languageNotes: Maintains both a Zod runtime schema and a hand-written strict JSON Schema so OpenAI and Gemini can enforce the same response contract.
